About Me

I’m Hyounjun Chang, an embedded systems engineering student at CU Boulder. My work spans Linux kernel development, embedded C programming, and hardware projects.

Skills

  • Linux kernel module development (character drivers, ioctl, llseek)
  • Buildroot & QEMU for AArch64 embedded targets
  • C system programming (sockets, file I/O, threading)
  • Hardware: Raspberry Pi, SPI/DMA, WS2812B LED control

Contact
